config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Inverted cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks English, US persona speaks Indonesian.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Society matters a lot, but I do not think it should automatically come before individual rights, because once you give the collective too much power, it becomes easy to justify abuse against minorities and ordinary people. In my view, a healthy society is built by protecting personal dignity, freedom, and due process first, then balancing those rights with public needs when there is a real and clear reason. I think many countries, including mine, have seen how “for the common good” can be used too loosely.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Bagi saya, hak individu harus tetap menjadi dasar utama, dan kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkannya. Dari pengalaman dan nilai yang umum di Amerika Serikat, saya melihat bahwa ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi terlalu banyak ruang atas nama “kepentingan umum,” minoritas dan orang biasa justru paling mudah dirugikan. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting untuk hal-hal seperti keselamatan publik dan kesehatan umum, tetapi pembatasan hak harus sempit, jelas, dan benar-benar perlu, bukan sekadar alasan yang terdengar baik. Jika tidak, frasa itu bisa menjadi pembenaran untuk penyalahgunaan kekuasaan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective in Indonesia, I have seen how easily “for the common good” can be used to silence criticism, pressure minorities, or excuse unfair treatment, so I do not trust that phrase unless the limits are very clear. Society does need public order, health, and shared responsibility, but those goals should be pursued through law and due process, not by treating individual rights as disposable. If individual rights are weakened too much, the society may look united on the surface while becoming less just underneath.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan atas hak individu secara umum. Dari sudut pandang saya sebagai orang Amerika, sejarah dan budaya politik di AS membuat saya sangat waspada ketika pemerintah atau mayoritas diberi kuasa terlalu besar atas nama “kepentingan umum,” karena itu sering paling merugikan minoritas dan orang yang tidak punya banyak suara. Kepentingan masyarakat memang bisa sah untuk keselamatan publik, kesehatan, atau keadaan darurat, tetapi pembatasan hak harus benar-benar sempit, jelas, dan bisa diuji, bukan sekadar klaim yang terdengar mulia. Kalau hak individu dianggap mudah dikorbankan, masyarakat justru kehilangan dasar keadilannya sendiri.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective as someone from Indonesia, I have seen how appeals to the "common good" can be used to pressure minorities, silence criticism, or excuse unfair treatment, so I am very cautious when people say society should come first. Public order, health, and safety do matter, but they should be handled through clear laws and due process, not by treating individual rights as something optional. If individual rights are weakened too much, the society may look orderly on the surface while becoming less just in reality.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan atas hak individu sebagai aturan umum. Sebagai orang Amerika, saya melihat bahwa ketika negara atau mayoritas diberi terlalu banyak kuasa atas nama kepentingan umum, yang paling sering terdampak justru minoritas dan orang biasa, dan itu terlalu mudah dibenarkan dengan bahasa yang terdengar mulia. Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting untuk keselamatan publik, kesehatan, dan keadaan darurat, tetapi pembatasan hak harus sangat sempit, jelas, dan bisa diuji secara ketat. Kalau tidak, “demi masyarakat” hanya menjadi alasan untuk melemahkan kebebasan dan keadilan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
